demos.title: Instrument Web Vitals
demos.teaches: Measure and optimize Core Web Vitals and performance metrics using Chrome DevTools Lighthouse audits.

demos.title: Optimize Bundles & Loading
demos.teaches: Analyze and reduce bundle size for faster loading by understanding esbuild and tree-shaking mechanisms.

demos.title: Optimized Controls
demos.teaches: Combine OnPush change detection with Reactive Forms for optimal form performance and minimal re-renders.

demos.title: Virtual Scroll
demos.teaches: Render large lists efficiently with CDK virtual scrolling by dynamically loading and unloading visible items.

demos.title: NgOptimizedImage
demos.teaches: Use NgOptimizedImage directive for responsive image optimization with automatic srcset generation.

demos.title: A11y Optimization
demos.teaches: Implement WCAG AA accessibility standards using semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, and accessibility linting.

demos.title: Implement Linting
demos.teaches: Configure and enforce code quality rules with ESLint to maintain consistent coding standards.
